    Syntax
    public sealed class TiffASCIIType : TiffDataType, IComparable

    Constructors

    Name Description
    TiffASCIIType(TiffTags)

    Initializes a new instance of the TiffASCIIType class.
    TiffASCIIType(ushort)

    Initializes a new instance of the TiffASCIIType class.

    Properties

    Name Description
    Count

    Gets the count of elements.
    DataSize

    Gets the additional data size in bytes (in case the 12 bytes is not enough to fit the tag data).
    TagType

    Gets the tag type.
    Text

    Gets or sets the text.
    Value

    Gets or sets the value this data type contains.

    Methods

    Name Description
    CopyInstanceData(TiffDataType)

    Copies the instance data into the cloned type.
    CreateInstance()

    Creates a new instance.
    ReadData(TiffStreamReader, long, long)

    Reads the additional data.
    WriteAdditionalData(TiffStreamWriter)

    Writes the additional tag data.
    WriteTagValueOrOffset(TiffStreamWriter, long)

    Writes the tag value or additional offset.
